detailedDescription:
64GB of DDR3 — a maximum config for compatible platforms.
Typically used in server or HEDT boards that support 8 memory slots.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 64GB
Generation: DDR3
Bandwidth: Up to 14.9 GB/s per channel
Voltage: 1.5V (1.35V for DDR3L)
Slots: 8 x 8GB or 4 x 16GB
ECC Support: No (standard) / Yes (server variants)
Compatible Sockets: LGA2011, server/HEDT platforms
